description: Warm-start repeated-exposure test — loads GPU0 10K checkpoint (warm W_K/W_Q/W_V/gates, cold M), replays C4 from position 0. No gate warmup scaffold, no clamps. Tests whether a retrieval mechanism primed on 10K steps unlocks faster L2/L3 gradient flow on second exposure to the same data. Task: task_fd444d. Pair: gate_warmup_diagnostic_100k.json (cold-start control on GPU0).
notes: Loads checkpoints/warm_start_10k_seed.safetensors — a copy of gate_warmup_diagnostic_step10000.safetensors with NO cursor sidecar. Absent sidecar triggers automatic data reset to position 0 (loop.py warm-start path). DO NOT copy the cursor sidecar alongside this checkpoint.
